waves.name: Sales-Blocker Fixes
waves.goal: Stop showing prospects empty bars and broken features. Eleven items, all under 1 day each, no blocking dependencies. After completion, every demo-blocker is closed and Phase 0-2 claim aligns with delivered capability.
waves.completion_signal: Org demo at /org/[slug] renders real packet, real funnel, real tier distribution; bulk email merge fields apply; donation receipts send; member management works; A/B winner picker fires; workflow verbs execute; OG images render on acquisition pages.

waves.name: Launch Enablement
waves.goal: First-paying-org operational. Items here are larger but parallelizable across four tracks (comms infrastructure, developer platform, migration unblockers, substrate honesty).
waves.completion_signal: First org signs up, imports from a recognized platform export or first live API adapter, sends a verified campaign, dispatches SMS, receives donation receipts, manages team. Substrate metrics (CAI, tier distribution) reflect real engagement. Outbound webhooks live. SDKs published. ses-proxy Lambda deployed.

waves.name: Capability Realization
waves.goal: Capability transcendence claims start being true at substrate level. Mainnet contracts deployed; TEE attesting resolution; delegation executor running; receipt anchoring in production; coalition aggregation API working; cross-border schema shipped; state legislator data ingested; three countries live (CA, GB, AU).
waves.completion_signal: Mainnet DistrictRegistry + DebateMarket + SnapshotAnchor on Scroll Mainnet. TEE Nitro Enclave attesting constituent resolution. FEATURES.DELEGATION=true with executor running scheduled cron. Receipt Merkle batches anchoring to Scroll. /api/v1/networks/[id]/stats returns real aggregation. CA/GB/AU postal codes resolve to representatives.

waves.name: Phase 3 Differentiators
waves.goal: Realize the categorical differentiators no incumbent can match. Multi-jurisdiction campaigns; agentic monitoring across 24 boundary types; reader dashboard; CRM integration; state-bill scorecards; coalition tier features fully justifying $200/mo differential.
waves.completion_signal: A constituent's agent monitors all 24 jurisdictions for their H3 cell. A single campaign delivers to federal + state + local + special district officials in one operation. A staffer with verified office profile sees their incoming verified campaigns in a dashboard. Indigov-class CRM consumes Commons feed via /api/v1/reader/incoming.

waves.name: Continuous / J-phase
waves.goal: Long-tail items operating on slower cadences: open-weight model integration into TEE; CivicEngine licensing decision; custom domain + DKIM per org; subdomain routing for white-label; receipt response email reply detection; provincial/state-second-chamber legislators internationally.
waves.completion_signal: Continuous improvements; no discrete completion milestone.
